document.title: TEST REPORT CTK-2024-02497
authorityOrJurisdiction: Recommendations on transport of dangerous goods / Manual of tests and criteria
standards: Manual of tests and criteria /Rev.7/Amend.1 Part III, subsection 38.3 Lithium metal and lithium ion batteries

sourceSummary.oneLine: CTK test report CTK-2024-02497 records UN 38.3 transport testing for lithium-ion battery model MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ with overall result Pass.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use of Report : UN Transport Test Report
keyPoints: Applicant and manufacturer are listed as mPLUS Electronics Co., Ltd.
Test sample/model is listed as Lithium-ion battery / MBP-3S1P3330-HAZ.
The report uses ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.7/Amend.1, Part III, subsection 38.3.
Tests T.1, T.2, T.3, T.4, T.5, and T.7 were conducted with Pass result; T.6 and T.8 are not applicable to batteries.
Battery description includes Li-ion rechargeable battery pack, approx. 198 g, 11.55Vdc, 3330mAh, 38.461Wh.
